## SaaS / Technology Industry Benchmarks

### Performance Metrics:
- Page Load Time (seconds): avg=3.2, good=2, excellent=1.5
- LCP (seconds): avg=3, good=2.5, excellent=1.8
- CLS Score: avg=0.15, good=0.1, excellent=0.05
- Bounce Rate (%): avg=45, good=35, excellent=25
- Organic CTR (%): avg=3.5, good=5, excellent=8
- Pages per Session: avg=2.5, good=3.5, excellent=5
- Session Duration (seconds): avg=180, good=240, excellent=360

Use these benchmarks to compare website performance and set realistic targets.
Last updated: 2026-05-20
